title: Enable Protected Mode with Short Range Request
description: Request payload for enabling TagProtect with short-range mode on a specific tag.

tagProtect.description: TagProtect configuration for enabling protection with short range.

action.description: Enables Protected Mode on the specified tag.

tagID.description: Hexadecimal tagID (EPC) of the target tag.

enableShortRange.description: Must be true to enable short-range protection mode.
